de.uka.ilkd.key.testgen.smt.counterexample

Packages that use de.uka.ilkd.key.testgen.smt.counterexample
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.testgen
This package contains the graphical user interface of the test generation backend.
de.uka.ilkd.key.testgen.smt.counterexample
 
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.testgen.smt.counterexample used by de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.testgen
    Class
    Description
    AbstractCounterExampleGenerator
    Implementations of this class are used find a counter example for a given Sequent using the SMT solver SolverTypes.Z3_CE_SOLVER.
    AbstractSideProofCounterExampleGenerator
    Implementation of AbstractCounterExampleGenerator which instantiates the new Proof as side proof.

    Implementations of this class are used find a counter example for a given Sequent using the SMT solver SolverTypes.Z3_CE_SOLVER.
